name: Cheesy Asparagus Boboli
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together mayo, cheese and mustard.
2. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
3. Fold the beaten egg whites into the mayo mixture.
4. Arrange the cut asparagus on the Boboli shells.
5. Spoon the mayo mixture over the asparagus.
6. Bake on an ungreased baking sheet at 450°F for about 8 to 10 minutes, or until puffed and lightly browned.
